name: agent-smith
description: Self-tuning feedback loop for Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode. Collects session metrics, analyzes patterns, and produces tuning recommendations to improve agent reliability and autonomy.

interface.shortDescription: Local session telemetry and tuning loop for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Collect local session metrics, roll them up into a queryable SQLite database, and generate tuning recommendations so Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode can be maintained side by side with one shared feedback loop.
